forecast_system.inference: same model applied recursively for 7-day chart; test metrics are 1-step only

model_choice_rationale: Target is next calendar day units_sold per store–product (one-step-ahead). Features use lagged units_sold and 7-day mean/std using only history through day T (shifted rolls, no same-day leakage). Longer horizons use the same model recursively (7 days in the app). Trees often help on count data; linear models are a strong baseline with clear lag structure.
